blocks.text: City within three of Arsenal — and they hold a game in hand
Man City cut Arsenal down 2-1 at the Etihad on Sunday. Three points the gap now, City with a game in hand — effectively level. The Premier League title race just restarted.
🎾 Mon 06:00 — Mutua Madrid Open begins; Ruud's clay season opens in Madrid

blocks.label: ⚽ La Liga title race — three defining fixtures
items: Tue 21:30 — Real Madrid vs Alavés; 9 points to close on Barcelona
Wed 21:30 — Barcelona vs Celta Vigo; Barça can extend their cushion
Fri 21:00 — Real Madrid at Real Betis; must-win away day in Seville

blocks.text: 🎮 Thu 17:00 — CCT Global Finals: BIG vs 100 Thieves — rain makes his case in Porto
